labels.name: epic
labels.description: Large feature spanning multiple issues or sections

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Something is broken or not working as expected

labels.name: status/in-progress
labels.description: Someone is actively working on it

issues.title: [EPIC] Complete Chapters 13-15 Implementation
issues.body:
## Overview
Complete implementation of Chapters 13-15 with all lessons and documentation updates.

## Sub-Tasks
- [ ] Documentation Updates
- [ ] PR.3: Memory Profile Lesson
- [ ] GR.4: Streaming RPC Lesson
- [ ] GR.5: Interceptors Lesson
- [ ] CG.2-4: Code Generation Lessons
- [ ] Update curriculum.json

## Success Criteria
✓ All lessons compile and run without errors
✓ All follow curriculum style guide
✓ All changes merged to main branch

issues.title: [DOCS] Documentation Updates for Chapters 13-15
issues.body:
## Overview
Update all documentation files to reflect completion of Chapters 13-15.

## Tasks
- [ ] Update ROADMAP.md
- [ ] Update CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Update README.md
- [ ] Create section READMEs
- [ ] Verify all links

## Success Criteria
✓ All documentation updated
✓ No broken links
✓ CI passes

issues.title: [FEATURE] Add PR.3: Memory Profile Lesson
issues.body:
Add memory profiling lesson to Chapter 13.

## Requirements
- Heap vs allocs profiles
- sync.Pool optimization
- Memory leak detection

## Testing
- [ ] Compiles without error
- [ ] Follows curriculum style
- [ ] All CI checks pass

issues.title: [FEATURE] Add GR.4: Streaming RPC Lesson
issues.body:
Add streaming RPC lesson to Chapter 14.

## Files to Create
- proto/stream.proto
- server/main.go
- client/main.go

## Testing
- [ ] Protobuf compiles
- [ ] Server and client work together
- [ ] All streaming patterns demonstrated
